name: xlsx-toolkit
description: > Audit Microsoft Excel (.xlsx) workbooks for sheet count, cell count, formula density, external references, named ranges, hidden sheets, and data validation rules. Use when reviewing a financial model, sharing a workbook externally, or when the user mentions xlsx audit, spreadsheet review, formula audit, or workbook leakage check.
author: borghei
summary_zh: 用于审查 Excel 工作簿的工具，可统计公式密度、外部引用、命名区域、隐藏表和数据验证规则，适合财务模型复核、对外分享前的泄密检查或电子表格安全审计。
